div.p: Percent of households passed by crucial statistics in the field
Over more than 30 years as distributor or Agent for Equipment of laboratories, and the Analysis of the water in Kingdom.

Alajlabchem has continuously accompanied its customers across multiple market segments in a wide range of industries service providers growing to to customers who are engaged in industries like Petrochemicals, Oil and Gas industry, Pharmaceuticals, Food and Beverage industry, Drinking Water, Wastewater, Utilities, Research institutes, Academic and university, Government agencies.
